business.name: Sharpe Total Lawn Care
business.tagline: Same-day service when Jacksonville yards need saving

hero.headline: *Same-day rescue* for Jacksonville lawns gone wild
hero.subheadline: City compliance notices, overgrown disasters, deployment neglect — we've seen it all and fixed it fast.

services_section.label: THE RESCUE WORK
services_section.heading: Every lawn disaster we handle
services_section.subheading: From compliance emergencies to routine maintenance

services.title: Emergency Lawn Recovery
services.description: Overgrown yards, weed takeovers, city notices — we'll get you compliant and looking sharp fast.

services.title: Fence Line & Edge Cleanup
services.description: Meticulous clearing where other crews rush through. Clean lines make all the difference.

services.title: Regular Maintenance
services.description: Keep your Jacksonville yard looking right year-round. No surprises, no missed visits.

services.title: Weed Control Treatment
services.description: Dandelions and weeds don't stand a chance. We'll restore your lawn to actual grass.

about.heading: Right here in your Jacksonville neighborhood
about.body: Ryan Sharpe and his crew live and work in Jacksonville. When you call, you get same-day response from people who know these yards, this climate, and what it takes to keep grass healthy in Florida heat. No corporate middleman — just neighbors helping neighbors get their lawns right.

reviews.name: Rye
reviews.text: Ryan and crew came out the same day I called with a city compliance issue. Asked for just the front mowed, but they went above and beyond.

reviews.name: Mac
reviews.text: Our lawn was an overgrown disaster full of dandelions. Ryan's crew worked tirelessly in the heat and were meticulous with the fence line cleanup.

reviews.name: Hannah N.
reviews.text: My yard was a mess after deployment and my previous guy quit. Ryan came in clutch with a free estimate and got it done same day at a great price.

reviews.name: Lauren B.
reviews.text: After two horrible lawn companies, I'm super impressed. Ryan lives around the corner and personally assessed my neglected yard with his daughters.

cta.heading: Yard emergency or routine care?
cta.body: Free estimates, same-day service, and the kind of work that gets your neighbors asking who did your lawn.
